title: aspidium divisum
intro: Aspidium divisum, also known as the divided maidenhair fern, is a species of fern native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include the ability to act as a laxative and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Aspidium divisum include its potential to reduce blood pressure, lower cholesterol levels, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Aspidium divisum is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
